rationale: This candidate provides a high-quality, natural translation that accurately captures the technical nuances of the original text. It correctly handles the MDX frontmatter and asset paths (using ../ as required). It maintains the heading structure perfectly. Compared to the 'current' version, it is nearly identical but ensures consistent terminology. The DeepSeek candidate had a duplicated H3 heading, and the Qwen candidate used a slightly less standard translation for 'sidecar' (旁车 vs the more common 旁路/伴生).
